title: Groundnut Elite Germplasm ICGV 86015. Plant Material Description no. 50
abstract: ICGV 86015 is an early-maturing, high-yielding breeding line. It is under consideration for release as Hung Loc 25 (HL 25) in Vietnam where it was found to be most suitable for intercropping with cassava and maize. It is also proposed for release as BARD 92 in Pakistan for double-cropping with wheat.
